chunks.text: ![Check out our QMSR Hub](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/7de56b9f-ab69-43ac-ab16-ebbf2ff0edd6.png) Solutions built for medical device teams to move faster, stay compliant, and grow with confidence. ![product-nav_quality-management-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_quality-management-icon.svg) Manage quality events, training, and documentation in one place. Control documents, training, and change with traceability. Track CAPAs, audits, and NCs with audit-ready records. Qualify suppliers and manage parts with visibility. ![product-nav_product-development-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_product-development-icon.svg) Connect design, risk, and AI-powered traceability as you build. Link needs, requirements, and verification to design controls. Automate traceability from dev tools for faster releases. Assess ISO 14971 risk as requirements and tests evolve. ![product-nav_clinical-evidence-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_clinical-evidence-icon.svg) Oversee studies with connected data, documents, and workflows. Capture compliant clinical data with a validated medical EDC. Plan and manage PMCF aligned to EU MDR expectations. Collect clinical outcome data in-person or remotely on any device. ![lightbulb-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/lightbulb-icon.svg) Built with regulatory insight to help medtech teams move faster with confidence. ![ai-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/ai-icon.svg) Find issues faster and make smarter decisions with less manual work. ![education-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/education-icon.svg) Tools and resources that help teams implement quickly and meet requirements. ![Asset 22@3x 1]() #### QMSR is coming. Is your quality system ready? This page is your one-stop resource for understanding what’s changing, what’s at stake, and how to stay compliant. ![Contact Sales](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/c0ac4c7c-1ce5-4f7f-9917-7641babf6ba1.png) ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/df8edfba-9502-444a-8575-76dad17db2c7.png) ![Contact Sales](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/c0ac4c7c-1ce5-4f7f-9917-7641babf6ba1.png) ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/df8edfba-9502-444a-8575-76dad17db2c7.png) # Be Audit Ready at a Moment’s Notice Greenlight Guru provides a connected quality ecosystem where every record of your QMS is organized, centralized, and traceable. Be ready for any type of audit, at any time with full confidence (and some peace of mind). Consider us an extension of your team — we’re here to help. ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/11c0188f-da04-4ac2-b710-83bce071e064.png) ![Audit-1](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Audit-1.png?format=webp&width=622&name=Audit-1.png) ## Don’t Miss This Critical Step Having audit processes in place and teams trained on those processes is essential for long-term success. Internal audits, external audits, supplier audits, FDA audits—the list goes on. Avoid overcomplicating these processes. Leverage an easy to use, task-based, organized, and seamless solution. ## 1,100+ of the world’s leading MedTech companies trust Greenlight Guru. ![C2Dx](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/c2dx_black.svg?format=webp) ![PhotoniCare](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Photonicare_black.png?format=webp&width=250&height=44&name=Photonicare_black.png) ![Sonavex](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Sonavex_black-1.png?format=webp&width=200&height=73&name=Sonavex_black-1.png) ![Astrego](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Astrego_Black.png?format=webp&width=200&height=46&name=Astrego_Black.png) ![Canterbury Scientific](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Canterbury_black.png?format=webp&width=200&height=50&name=Canterbury_black.png) ![Endowave](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Endowave_Black.png?format=webp&width=200&height=42&name=Endowave_Black.png) ![GlucoSet](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Glucoset_Black.png?format=webp&width=200&height=49&name=Glucoset_Black.png) ![MediView](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/MediView_Black.png?format=webp&width=200&height=60&name=MediView_Black.png) ![Milliken](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/Milliken_black.svg?format=webp) ![Puzzle Medical Hrtzl](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Puzzle_Hz_Black.png?format=webp&width=254&height=65&name=Puzzle_Hz_Black.png) ![Zyris](https://www.greenlight.guru/hs-fs/hubfs/Zyris_black_rs.png?format=webp&width=210&height=70&name=Zyris_black_rs.png) ## Take the Anxiety Out of Audits We know audits are a necessary yet stressful part of our industry. Greenlight Guru is here to help drive a positive audit experience every time. We will also be there to celebrate your successes with you. ### Lead With Confidence Successful audits are a competitive advantage and should be treated as such. When you’re confident your system is compliant, you’re already ahead. ### Centralize Your Source of Truth Audits don’t have to be complicated. Say goodbye to piles of paperwork and hours in your audit war room. Have full visibility and traceability into any document you may need and even ones you may have initially missed. ### Embrace Every Audit Be ready for all audits— even remote ones. Our cloud-based system ensures the challenges of paper-based audits are in the past and that everything you could possibly need is only a few clicks away. ### Being Compliant is Key Whether its ISO 13485, ISO 14971, 21 CFR Part 11, 21 CFR Part 820, EU MDR or another one of the many acronyms

chunks.doc_name: Medical Device Audit: How to Become Audit Ready | Greenlight Guru
chunks.text: Every Audit Be ready for all audits— even remote ones. Our cloud-based system ensures the challenges of paper-based audits are in the past and that everything you could possibly need is only a few clicks away. ### Being Compliant is Key Whether its ISO 13485, ISO 14971, 21 CFR Part 11, 21 CFR Part 820, EU MDR or another one of the many acronyms — our workflows ensure your processes adhere to the industry’s requirements and best practices. ## Conduct Audits With Ease We are here to alleviate common audit anxieties so you can focus on building compliant life-changing medical technologies. ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/e1699def-5c93-4d53-b4e2-1e9bdb1ec2f4.png) ### Eliminate Inefficiencies With Automated Processes With custom workflow templates created by your company, it's simple to incorporate specific, detailed steps while following your company's protocol to automate the process. Keep a single, up-to-date workflow with management controls in place for your audit process. Automate your workflow inside your QMS to help you track the correct action items to the right user or group - increasing your team's efficiency and reducing the need for additional resources. ### Start Now, Succeed Later You likely have an internal audit schedule you need to follow. It’s time to move that red circle on your calendar into your QMS so you can see your planned annual quality audits and manage them as your event date approaches. Set due dates, send notifications, and make managing the planned audit process a little less daunting. ### Teamwork Makes the Audit Dream Work Assign audit-related tasks to your team and track everyone’s progress towards due dates. Manage tasks, follow-ups, communications, and any actions that result from audit findings. Escalate high-risk findings for investigation and monitor low-risk findings for recurrence. Access your audit artifacts and provide them to the auditor in a few clicks with absolute confidence that nothing has changed. Compliance is a team sport — put Greenlight Guru on your roster. ### Many Inputs, One Source of Truth Tie the procedures, the tasks, and all audit information into a single workflow. Create a single audit report so all the data is accessible in one single document. Ensure full traceability and auditability throughout as you easily view what was changed, why it was changed, when it changed, who changed it, and what was impacted due to an audit. You can cure audit headaches with one click. ### Eliminate Inefficiencies With Automated Processes With custom workflow templates created by your company, it's simple to incorporate specific, detailed steps while following your company's protocol to automate the process. Keep a single, up-to-date workflow with management controls in place for your audit process. Automate your workflow inside your QMS to help you track the correct action items to the right user or group - increasing your team's efficiency and reducing the need for additional resources. ### Start Now, Succeed Later You likely have an internal audit schedule you need to follow. It’s time to move that red circle on your calendar into your QMS so you can see your planned annual quality audits and manage them as your event

Our auditors told us, "Wow, you're steps ahead of anyone else." ## Don’t Leave Audits up to Chance Don’t let the fear of fines, penalties, and product recalls keep you up at night. With Greenlight Guru, you can be audit-ready at any moment, which means more life-changing products in the market faster. ![Get a Demo](https://no-cache.hubspot.com/cta/default/495719/e1699def-5c93-4d53-b4e2-1e9bdb1ec2f4.png) ## Frequently Asked Questions ### What types of audits does Greenlight Guru support? ### How does Greenlight Guru help medical device companies stay audit-ready at all times? ### Can Greenlight Guru generate audit reports or summary documents automatically? ### How quickly can teams onboard and use the audit features in Greenlight Guru? ## Explore Our Resources ### Recent FDA Draft Guidances Episode 343 ### Planning an FDA Submission Episode 342 ### Exploring Breakthrough Device Designation Episode 333 ### Regulatory Strategy
